title: Remove CRI-O related annotations
body:
The annotations should be maintained by CRI-O itself to decouple the projects from a dependency perspective.

Alternative to https://github.com/containers/common/pull/1902

```release-note
Removed CRI-O specific annotations from `pkg/annotations`.
```
